derived_keywords.rules_text: Adeptus Astartes units gain the Ravenwing keyword if they are Dark Angels and have Mounted, or are Vehicles with Fly.
Adeptus Astartes units gain the Deathwing keyword if they have the Terminator keyword, the Dreadnought keyword, or are one of the listed units.

detachments.name: Unforgiven Task Force

rule.name: Grim Resolve
rule.rules_text: While an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army is Battle-shocked, change the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit to 1, instead of 0.

restrictions: Your army can include Dark Angels units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.

enhancements.name: Shroud of Heroes
enhancements.rules_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining. If the bearer was Battle-shocked when it was destroyed, it is instead returned with its full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Stubborn Tenacity
enhancements.rules_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Battle-shocked and below its Starting Strength.

enhancements.name: Weapons of the First Legion
enhancements.rules_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons. While the bearer is Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Pennant of Remembrance
enhancements.rules_text: Ancient model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. While that unit is Battle-shocked, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: Armour of Contempt
stratagems.timing: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Fire Discipline
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT], [HEAVY] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

stratagems.name: Unforgiven Fury
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. In addition, if one or more Adeptus Astartes units from your army are currently Battle-shocked, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: Intractable
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Grim Retribution
stratagems.timing: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that had one or more models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit's attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only the enemy unit that just attacked it, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: Unbreakable Lines
stratagems.timing: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
stratagems.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Primarch of the First Legion
abilities.rules_text: In your Command phase, select one Primarch of the First Legion abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: The Emperor's Shield
abilities.rules_text: Each time a melee attack is allocated to this model, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks. In addition, each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Dark Angels Bodyguard
abilities.rules_text: While this model is within 3 inches of one or more friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.rules_text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

selectable_abilities.name: Primarch of the First Legion
selectable_abilities.duration: Until the start of your next Command phase

options.name: All Secrets Revealed
options.rules_text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem but before that Stratagem's effects are resolved, if that unit is within 12 inches of this model, you gain 1CP and that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, in addition to that unit being Battle-shocked, that Stratagem's effects are not resolved.

options.name: Martial Exemplar (Aura)
options.rules_text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6 inches of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

options.name: No Hiding from the Watchers (Aura)
options.rules_text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6 inches of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
